mapper.select: SELECT uf.id, uf.user_id, uf.friend_id, uf.status, uf.create_time, cu.nick_name as friend_name, cu.avatar as friend_avatar FROM user_friend uf LEFT JOIN content_user cu ON uf.friend_id = cu.user_id WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} AND uf.status = #{status} ORDER BY uf.create_time DESC

SELECT uf.id, uf.user_id, uf.friend_id, uf.status, uf.create_time, cu.nick_name as friend_name, cu.avatar as friend_avatar FROM user_friend uf LEFT JOIN content_user cu ON uf.user_id = cu.user_id WHERE uf.friend_id = #{userId} AND uf.status = '0' ORDER BY uf.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_friend (user_id, friend_id, status, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{friendId}, #{status}, sysdate())
mapper.update: UPDATE user_friend SET status = #{status} WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND friend_id = #{friendId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_friend WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND friend_id = #{friendId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_friend WHERE friend_id = #{userId} AND status = '0'
